_comment: SHA-256 of every file under eta_v3_framework/v1_locked/. v1 is intentionally frozen for reproducibility (see LOCKED.txt 2026-04-15). The pytest gate at tests/level_1_unit/test_v1_locked_frozen.py asserts every file's hash matches this manifest. Regenerate ONLY when LOCKED.txt is moved/replaced and a new freeze is intended.
_regen_command: python -c "import hashlib,json,pathlib; root=pathlib.Path('eta_v3_framework/v1_locked'); print(json.dumps({p.name: hashlib.sha256(p.read_bytes()).hexdigest() for p in sorted(root.glob('*')) if p.is_file()}, indent=2))"
